event.value:
{{(
  (queries.fetchConfigDetails.data?.["Param Type"] !== "PARAM_TYPE_SINGLE_VALUED" &&
   (queries.fetchConfigValues.data?.length || 0) >= 1) ||

  (queries.fetchConfigDetails.data?.["Param Type"] === "PARAM_TYPE_SINGLE_VALUED" &&
   page.variables.isMarketplaceAware &&
   (queries.fetchConfigValues.data?.length || 0) >= 1)
)
? "View 2"
: (
    queries.fetchConfigDetails.data?.["Param Type"] !== "PARAM_TYPE_SINGLE_VALUED" ||
    (queries.fetchConfigDetails.data?.["Param Type"] === "PARAM_TYPE_SINGLE_VALUED" &&
     page.variables.isMarketplaceAware)
  )
? "View 1"
: "View 0"}}
